title: Actually Divisions
description: This Minecraft mod re-adds the armors, tools, and weapons from Actually Additions to newer versions of Actually Additions. It also works with Actually Subtractions.
body:
# ![Actually Additions Revival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/695fb7807f4caa436d31d2fb2391d9f652a959dc.png) 

This mod brings back the missing armors, tools, and weapons from _**Actually Additions**_ to newer versions of the mod. It also seamlessly integrates with _**Actually Subtractions**_ , ensuring full compatibility.

You’ll once again have access to gear made from **Enori Crystal**, **Diamatine**, **Emeradic**, **Emerald**, **Obsidian**, **Restonia**, **Black Quartz**, **Palis**, and **Void Crystal** . Additionally, the mod introduces **AIOTs** (All-In-One Tools) for every included mineral, along with vanilla materials, making resource gathering more efficient than ever!

You can get [Actually Additions here.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/actually-additions)

And [Actually Subtractions here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/actually-subtractions)



⚠ IMPORTANT: If you encounter any bugs or issues, please contact me, NOT the original creator of Actually Additions. I am the one re-adding this content to Actually Divisions.
